creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Sorry for the late report.

The architecture is in all cases amd64.

The port in question is built on our local FreeBSD poudriere builders, running CURRENT in that cases.

I realised that when explicitely installing the port sysutils/screen from one of the official FreeBSD-latest repositories, the package is replcaed with the remark that an option has changed - I can not remember that anything of that kind has happened to the config/port of ours. So, I guess something went wrong in the past couple of month when the port has been upgraded with the options. At this moment, the offsite builders are building a new repo and I had to remove and set again the config options.

I'll report again if the problem still persists (then I'm ut of options ...).
